description:
Super Meat Boy is a tough as nails 2D platformer from the creator Edmund McMillen, 
who you might recognize from games such as The End is Nigh or The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth.

Alpha_1.description:
# Super Meat Boy Archipelago Alpha 1

## What's New

Client is completely reworked to work with Zuils AP world. Cheers to Zuils for converting their manual into a functional APworld. You created so much more work but the end result should hopefully pay off. 

## Bug Fixes

### Par Times — All of Them
Turns out **97% of par times were wrong.** Nearly every A+ detection was either too strict (blocking legitimate A+ grades) or too lenient (gifting fake ones). I went back to scouring the games code and replaced all 250 par times with the real values. If your A+ checks weren't sending before, they should now.

### Warp Zones Actually Work Now
Warp zone completion data was being read from incorrect addresses. I dove deeper and found more consistent save flags. 

### Boss Fights No Longer Psychic
Two fixes here:
- **Quitting a boss fight** no longer counts as beating it. Previously, just *leaving* the boss level would trigger a victory. Now the client checks the actual boss defeat flag in memory.
- **Beating a boss actually registers.** The client was reading the wrong byte 

### No More Check Flood on Connect
Connecting to a server would sometimes fire off dozens of false location checks at once — bandages you never collected, milestones you never reached. This happened because the client was scanning memory *after* writing its own data into it, then detecting its own writes as player progress. 

### Warp Zones Don't Impersonate Light Levels
Completing a warp zone sub-level used to send a false completion check for the light world level with the same number (e.g., beating The Guy sub-level 1 would also send "5-1 The Witness").

### Things I know are not quite right
The bandage counter can be a bit weird. Luckily the clients internal counter tracks for the bandage milestones better than the game does due to me modifying how characters unlock etc. 

###
I have not completed the data on Xmas levels. Avoid that setting for now.

### Quirks
Chapter 7 requires unlocking both the chapter key and bandage girl as a character. 
I never got the time to fully test a dark world Dr Fetus goal so be wary of that option. 


*"I don't want to be the guy who has to test all of this again." — The Guy, probably*
Alpha_1.title: Alpha 1
